rulings.Case Title: GLORIA YEE VS. FAT NOODLE 2ND SF, LLC, ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Breach Of Contract Cause Of Action Against Defendant Fat Noodle 2nd Sf, Llc
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF GLORIA YEE's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Breach Of Contract Cause Of Action Against Defendant Fat Noodle 2nd SF, LLC DENIED. There is a triable issue of fact regarding mitigation of damages (See Defendant's Material Facts 1 and 2). Additionally, Plaintiff failed to shift its burden. Plaintiff failed to provide evidence re: contract. Providing evidence with reply is not proper. Contrary to Plaintiff's assertion Castillo v. Glenair (2018) 23 Cal. Appl.5th 262 does not stand for such proposition. In Castillo evidence was presented, but not referenced in the Separate Statement; evidence was also used and relied upon by the opposing party. This is not the case here. Further, summary adjudication may only be granted if it disposes of a cause of action in its entirety. Plaintiff here is moving to summarily adjudicate a cause of action for breach of contract, but does not entirely dispose of one of the elements, i.e. damages to be partially "proved at a later date." (Points and Authorities in Support of Motion 7:14 and 7:17.) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JYOTHSNA TALKAD ET AL VS. 1314 POLK STREET OWNERS ASSOCIATION ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Dipali Shah'S Deposition And Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFFS JYOTHSNA TALKAD, RADHAKRSHNA TALKAD, and LEELAVATHY TALKAD's Motion To Compel Dipali Shah'S Deposition And Production Of Documents And Request For Sanctions Transferred to department 301 to be heard on August 9, 2018 at 9:00 a.m. Moving party to provide courtesy copy of reply to department 301 no later than July 30, 2018 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOEL DROUET VS. JOHNNY HANSELL ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 3. Defendant Johnny Hansell'S Demurrer OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1010.6 and CCP 1013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE SAUCEDO VS. JOSHUA RODDY ET AL (**case reclassified as regular civil**)
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs/Cross-Defendants Notice Of Motion To Strike And Motion To Strike The Cross-Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTs JORGE SAUCEDO and JAMES BARRIENTOS' Motion To Strike The Cross-Complaint granted with leave to amend to allege facts (not conclusions) to support malice, oppression, or fraud with requisite particularity. All amendments shall be in bold-face font and underlined. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JORGE SAUCEDO VS. JOSHUA RODDY ET AL (**case reclassified as regular civil**)
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 4. CROSS DEFENDANTs JORGE SAUCEDO and JAMES BARRIENTOS' DEMURRER TO CROSS COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to allege verbatim relevant terms of the contract (or attach the contract) and to allege facts, not conclusions to allege each element of each cause of action. All amendments shall be in bold-face font. = (501/REQ)

Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANT JESSE HANLIN's MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT DENIED. The ruling on a demurrer in a prior unlawful detainer based on a different operative notice is not a bar to voluntary dismissal of the action without prejudice and filing of a new action. Additionally, Defendant fails to present any judicially noticeable documents - Order and Notice of Entry of order, which would have triggered the time for Plaintiff to file an amended complaint in the prior action. = (501/REQ)
Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 6. DEFENDANT FREDDY MARATAYA's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, First Amended Complaint on file. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. THOMAS DOBER ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 27, 2018 line 7. DEFENDANT THOMAS DOBER's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained with leave to amend to address all issues raised by demurrer. No opposition filed. = (501/REQ)
